overview: The todo-api has no dependencies and must be built first to provide the REST backend. The todo-web depends on todo-api and is built second, consuming its endpoints.

phases.name: Backend Foundation
phases.description: Build the independent Go REST API providing auth, todos, and categories.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Provide user registration, login, logout, and password reset with secure session cookies
CRUD operations for todos with optimistic locking and filtering
CRUD operations for per-user categories with cascade-unassign on delete
Enforce per-user isolation, input sanitization, and auth attempt logging
Expose /health endpoint and JSON error responses under /api/v1
components.architectureContext: Stateless Go backend on port 9090 serving the todo-web SPA over HTTPS. Uses an in-memory repository abstraction (swappable for Postgres) and issues HTTP-only session cookies consumed by the frontend.
keyConsiderations: Use bcrypt for password hashing and 32-byte random session tokens stored server-side
Implement account lockout after 3 failed attempts (15 min) returning 423
Enforce optimistic locking via version field, returning 409 on mismatch
Structure repositories behind interfaces to enable later Postgres swap
Permissive CORS with credentials for the frontend origin; use sync.RWMutex for concurrency

phases.name: Frontend
phases.description: Build the React SPA that consumes the backend API.

components.name: todo-web
responsibilities: Provide register/login/password-reset pages wired to the backend with cookie-based auth
Render todos dashboard with filters, create/edit/delete and completion toggling
Serve SPA via nginx with /health endpoint and SPA fallback routing
components.architectureContext: Static React SPA served by nginx on port 8080. Calls todo-api at VITE_API_BASE with credentials:'include' to leverage HTTP-only session cookies.
keyConsiderations: Never store tokens in JS; rely on HTTP-only cookies
Send version field on PUT to respect optimistic locking (handle 409s)
Surface API validation errors inline; support filter query params
nginx.conf must include try_files SPA fallback and /health location
Multi-stage Dockerfile: node build → nginx:alpine serving dist/
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web (static)
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
